title: clone
description: make multiple copies of an abstraction

messages.description: first number selects instance; rest of the list is sent to that instance's inlet
output with a prepended instance number
output from all instances either as multichannel signal or summed into mono signal

flags.name: -x
flags.description: avoids including a first argument setting voice number

flags.name: -di
flags.description: distribute multichannel input signals across cloned patches

flags.name: -do
flags.description: combine signal outputs to make a multichannel signal

methods.description: opens a copy, takes copy number and visualization status (1 to open, 0 to close)
forwards a message to the next instance's inlet (incrementing and repeating circularly)
forwards a message to the previous instance's inlet sent to by "this" or "next
sends a message to all instances' inlet

body: clone creates any number of instances of a desired abstraction (a patch loaded as an object in another patch
